description: Style NoteWhat could make you look better than a nice pair of heels while wearing a dress or even a skirt? In fact, people wear heels even with jeans and it looks amazing. A nice pair of stilettos from cat walk is just what you need.Product DetailsBlunt toed stilettos heels with silver footbedA transparent mesh at the forefoot with crystal embellishmentsCrystal embellishments on heel and heel baseTPU outsole and heel patch with pattern grovesHeel: 4& rdquo Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
